title: Superpower Onboarding
description: An awesome Onboarding mod which connects to DC superheroes in Arrzee's Multiverse!
body:
**The best Superpower Onboarding Mod**
I have spent a long time creating this mod! I really hope you enjoy. Email me at abelly@abelly99.com to report bugs!

**Commands**
- /addpower (lets the following player add a power) - /addpower <target>
- /rechoosepower (lets the following players a power) - /rechoosepower <target>
- /heroselectorconfig (configuration/settings) - /heroselectorconfig <setting> <value>

**Configuration Command Help**
Settings to choose from, and their value:
- maxPowers: amount of powers everyone has
- noHuman: removes the option of "human" in the selector
- noRandom: removes the option of "random" in the selector
